name: University Campus Multi-Building Solvent Reporting
description:
Add Acetone (CAS 67-64-1) to the 'State Tech University' facility record in EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. Configure it as a Pure Liquid (EHS: No). Check the correct GHS hazards based on its SDS: Flammable (gases, aerosols, liquids, or solids), Serious eye damage or eye irritation, and Specific target organ toxicity (single or repeated exposure). Set the inventory quantities to Max: 25000 lbs, Avg: 15000 lbs, 365 days on-site. You must add exactly THREE distinct storage locations: 
1) Container: Underground Tank, Pressure: Ambient, Temp: Ambient, Description: 'Facilities Management Yard - UST 1'. 
2) Container: Steel Drum, Pressure: Ambient, Temp: Ambient, Description: 'Chemistry Building - Room 104 Flammables Cabinet'. 
3) Container: Carboy (or Glass), Pressure: Ambient, Temp: Less than ambient temperature, Description: 'Biology Research Tower - Cold Room B'. 
Once completely configured, save the chemical and export the facility submission file to 'C:\workspace\university_acetone_submission.zip'.
